summary: Executed backend pytest regression (12 tests) and frontend Playwright E2E checks for Medi Track core flows. Backend passed fully; frontend passed all tested critical flows except AI chat panel opening in UI.

minor.issue: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was not exported in pytest shell environment by default; tests required explicit env injection to run against public URL

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking floating chat toggle does not open chat panel; chat input never renders

integration_issues.issue: Backend /api/chat works (pytest passed), but UI cannot reach chat input because panel does not open

action_items: Fix floating AI chat widget interaction so toggle reliably opens panel and input renders
Check for overlay/z-index or event interception near bottom-right corner (Emergent badge + fixed chat button overlap)
Ensure CI/supervisor test shells expose REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for pytest runs
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/meditrack-app.jsx is ~1400 lines (>700 guideline) and should be split into focused modules/pages for maintainability and safer regression changes
markTaken/deleteMedicine/deleteRecord paths in ProtectedApp have no try/catch; API errors can cause uncaught promise behavior in UI
seed_data_creation: Created temporary TEST patient via API/UI during tests; backend test includes account cleanup endpoint call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints are healthy on public URL and regression test file is reusable. Reproduce chat issue by patient login -> dashboard -> click floating-chat-toggle-button; panel count stays 0.
rca of the issue: RCA (chat): API layer is healthy (/api/chat passed in pytest), so failure is frontend interaction/rendering. Reproduced 3 times: chat toggle button visible/clickable, but floating-chat-panel is never inserted into DOM. Likely UI event interception or stacking/overlay issue around bottom-right fixed controls.
